title: Infinity SMP
description: Plenty of new biomes, new bosses, and much more!
body:
Plenty of new biomes, new bosses, and much more! Infinite Realm started out as a private pack for just a few friends of mine that turned into something others wanted to play! It has all the basics that most other "big name" packs include but with a nice mix of some of newer or lesser-known mods as well.
  • JourneyMap (by techbrew)
  • Simple Voice Chat (by henkelmax)
  • Create Fabric (by tropheusj)
  • Simple Discord RPC [Forge/Fabric/Quilt] (by hypherionsa)
  • Scout (by Cynosphere)
  • Effortless Fabric (by huskcasaca)
  • Oh The Biomes You'll Go Refabricated (by AOCAWOL)
  • Macaw's Fences and Walls (by sketch_macaw)
  • Comforts (Fabric 1.16.5 - 1.19.2) (by TheIllusiveC4)
  • Fabric API (by modmuss50)
  • Bookshelf (by DarkhaxDev)
  • Sodium (by jellysquid3_)
  • Extra Origins (by MoriyaShiine)
  • Origins (Fabric) (by Apace100)
  • Origins Extra Keybinds (by thatrobin3001)
  • Architectury API (Fabric/Forge) (by shedaniel)
  • Immersive Armors [Fabric/Forge] (by Conczin)
  • RPG Origins (by DaBananaCat)
  • Cloth Config API (Fabric/Forge) (by shedaniel)
  • Lithium (Fabric) (by jellysquid3_)
  • Roughly Enough Items Fabric/Forge (REI) (by shedaniel)
  • TerraBlender (Fabric) (by TheAdubbz)
  • Iris Shaders (by coderbot)
  • Botany Pots (by DarkhaxDev)
  • Voice Chat Interaction (by henkelmax)
  • Macaw's Bridges (by sketch_macaw)
  • Pehkui (by Virtuoel)
  • Ultris: Boss Expansion (by limesplatus)
  • Indium (by comp500)
  • Phosphor (Fabric) (by jellysquid3_)
